mnemonics.title: Node Requirements
mnemonics.content: 3F+1: For 'f' faults, need 3 times plus one nodes

acronyms.usage: Describes systems resilient to arbitrary failures

visualTips.visualization: Imagine nodes passing signed message batons in relay race
Picture nodes with cracked shields leaking false messages

analogies.analogy: Jury deliberation with some members deliberately lying
Sports team substituting captain when they're underperforming
